name: loutools
title: LouTools Remote
description: Universal media remote control — play/pause, seek, volume, speed across YouTube, Suno, Spotify without stealing focus
author: loudog

commands.name: playpause
commands.title: Play / Pause
commands.description: Toggle play/pause on the active media target

commands.name: mute
commands.title: Mute
commands.description: Toggle mute on the active media target

commands.name: fullscreen
commands.title: Fullscreen
commands.description: Toggle fullscreen on the active media target

commands.name: status
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.description: Show current media status — title, position, speed, volume

commands.name: set-target
commands.title: Set Remote Target
commands.description: Lock remote commands to a specific app (YouTube, Spotify, etc.) or set to auto-detect

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
